summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OzLight LED aquarium controller app. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with minor issues in modes activation.

ui_bugs.issue: AKTİF badge not appearing when mode cards are clicked
Fine-tune sliders not appearing after mode activation
DOM attachment errors when clicking mode cards - elements becoming detached

passed_tests: Backend health check and all API endpoints (10/10)
All 5 bottom navigation tabs (Kontrol, Modlar, Simülasyon, Zamanlama, Ayarlar)
Control panel: 5 compact sliders (R, G, B, WW, CW) with glow preview
Aquarium simulation: BAŞLAT button and day simulation
Schedule tab: YENİ ZAMANLAICI creation button
Settings tab: Device info, saved state, protocol info, disconnect button
Android project structure and BLE permissions
Slider interactions and color preview updates
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modes activation functionality: 1) Ensure AKTİF badge appears when modes are selected, 2) Implement fine-tune sliders after mode activation, 3) Fix DOM attachment issues in mode cards to prevent elements becoming detached during interactions
